ascend_skill.desc:
Kasumi's Highlight does not deplete the Highlight gauge, and can activate critical hits.
On an ally's action, with 2 or more Step stacks, can use Spellbound Cinders to enter Masquerade mode, and can activate Highlight 1 time (Spellbound Cinders has a cooldown time of 3 turns). This effect lasts until the start of Kasumi's second turn after entering Masquerade (or if Spellbound Cinders is used during her own turn, until the end of the following turn).
Also, for every Step stack gained while in Masquerade mode, increase Attack by 10% and critical rate by 4%.
When Masquerade ends, lose all Step stacks. If Masquerade ends and Highlight has not been used, activate Highlight on 1 random foe.
ascend_skill.name: Masked Ball

ascend_skill.desc:
Extend the duration of Dance Partner by 1 turn.
When using Invitation, increase critical rate of Kasumi and her Dance Partner by 15% for 3 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Charming Invite

ascend_skill.desc: With 2 Step stacks, increase Attack by 33%. With 3 or more stacks, increase critical damage by 33%. These effects are permanent.
ascend_skill.name: Blossoming Dance Floor

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Cinderella Glow and Thief Tactics by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Glittering Night

ascend_skill.desc:
When activating a Highlight, gain 1 Stroke of Midnight stack. Spend 1 Stroke of Midnight stack when taking damage, and evade that damage (not activated by some skills).
Also, with 4 Step stacks, increase Highlight damage by 50%.
ascend_skill.name: Toll the Hour

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Invitation and Midnight Magic by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Neverending Dream

ascend_skill.desc: After Kasumi activates her Highlight, she can activate her Highlight 1 more time while in Masquerade mode. This Highlight has 80% of its normal damage, and can be activated 1 time each time Masquerade mode is entered. Also, it will not activate automatically when Masquerade mode ends.
ascend_skill.name: Unmasked Ball

highlight_skill.desc:
Can be activated in Masquerade mode. Deal Bless damage to 1 foe equal to 273.1%/301.0%/289.8%/317.8% of Attack. Also, with Step stacks, gain additional effects accordingly.
Lead Step: Increase Highlight damage by 15% for each stack.
Follow Step: Increase Highlight critical rate by 10%, and critical damage by 20%.
highlight_skill.name: Highlight

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Bless damage to 1 foe equal to 186.9%/206.1%/198.4%/217.5% of Attack, and gain Lead Step.
If this skill is activated by an ally with Dance Partner, deal Bless damage to 1 foe equal to 121.6%/134.1%/129.1%/141.5%, and gain 1 Lead Step.
Lead Step stacks up to 3 times.
normal_skill.name: Cinderella Glow

normal_skill.desc:
Grant Dance Partner to 1 ally for 1 turn. Only 1 ally may have Dance Partner at one time.
Increase Attack of Kasumi and the selected ally by 32.4%/35.7%/34.4%/37.7% for 3 turns. Also, Kasumi gains Follow Step. This effect does not stack.
When an ally with Dance Partner uses a skill, immediately activate Cinderella Glow 1 time on 1 random foe (if the skill is activated on a foe, activate Cinderella Glow 1 time on that foe).
normal_skill.name: Invitation

normal_skill.desc:
Deal Bless damage to 1 foe equal to 249.1%/274.6%/264.4%/289.9% of Attack.
When using this skill while in Masquerade mode, increase skill damage by 30%, and critical damage by 29.3%/29.3%/31.1%/31.1%.
normal_skill.name: Midnight Magic

passive_skill.desc: For every Step stack, increase Bless damage by 15% (up to 45.0%).
passive_skill.name: Rhythm Count

passive_skill.desc: When an ally other than Kasumi uses a Highlight, increase Kasumi's Attack by 45.0% for 2 turns. Stacks up to 2 times.
passive_skill.name: Steps of Faith
